content: I... Need help
How...
How do i play this team

Based of my assumption.

The silver haired girl is support-dps
The blonde boy is debuffer
The whale girl is dps/aoe dps.
And the pink hair girl is an healer.
I don't really know how to really  increase their damage efficiency
they are powerful enough for main story, but they is not a fast build
for my style, the first awakened give to 拉蒙娜, and the second give to 萝坦, most of time having 2 awakened character is enough

content: this is my live record, but in Chinese, chapter 1 and 2 with all stages, 3 4 5 with final battle

拉蒙娜 and 萝坦 both support-dps 🤣 
拉蒙娜 using 女王之剑, and use her ult draw 女王之剑 back and play it again
u could sell 萝坦's 恣睢之浪
Oh
I'm stuck at like some lvl
Chapter2
lv.20 match chapter 2
give chapter2's map special mechanism to 女王之剑 is a good idea
if u could play more then 3 女王之剑 in one turn, that would be powerful
So the yellow mask have no passive team?
This card dint work on any elements except kraken things rightm
blue / red / purple is  easy to see their passive mechanism, yellow is hard
Passive didn't activate when you don't put any of them on the same element right?
Like there is 3 yellow but 1 red
于暴雨之中（0 stars）：the 「strike」 of wearer have 55% chance gain 1 cost point. if team is blue faction, when this effects was triggered, force 1 tentacle give 1 attack.
only 4 yellow become yellow team, yellow + other = that color team
Oh so if you do blue faction, the tentacle trigger twice?
addition, this effects limits once per turn.
nop. The wearer's strike was played, u gain 1 cost point, and tentacle attack once.
let me give u some pic
Oh if the character that wear it, when they use attk skill, the tentacle attk once, and refresh next round
great
my jellyfish wear 「于暴雨之中」now
and i play jellyfish's 「strike」
total dmg is : 44 by strike, 146 critical dmg by tentacle （basic 87）
That neat
So does this card good at the pink haired fish boy i got?
「于暴雨之中」is best for 法洛思, the girl at the most left in my sreen shot
The umbrella girl right?
Ohhh
So he is good with her?
and 55% is so annoying, u spend extra 3 same card could make it become 100%
This girl give poison status effects, right?
The purple bubble things?
yes, that is poison
but that build need some overlay
I see
dont worry about who wear what
main story was not that hard
Ok so what the best rotation?
if u want to use 凯刻斯, i recommended 伤痛之鳍 / 伏于夜色
he fits well in  shield and counter-strike build
icon of counter-strike was like that
This is couter attk?! So dmg that dealth with you deal dmg to the enemy that attk you base on what? The enemy or the unit that being hit?
i strongly recommended those functional equipment for every team, especially u new man
I see
1 hits 1 times counter attack
normal team have 0 counter attack stacks
Well this guy deal alot of dmg, what is his playstyle?
u need team member to again new tentacle, and himself or team member to gain power( in CN is 力量) stacks
So you mean is the blue icon (counter attk) deal dmg when you getting hit base on the count below, hit by the enemy that have shield sword icon or any hit?
any direct attack from enemy
Oh i see, so the sword shiel icon on enemy type attk is their counter attk?
no, sword just stand for going to attack u, shield for going to gain som amor
So after attk they gain shield?
the purple downward arrow stand for give u some debuff or bad card
yes
So this guy need to have blue team faction or versatile on non-faction team?
😆  no a non-faction team, 凯刻斯 always on blue
No no i mean ahaha
This guy don't need faction passive right?
The tentacle things?
u could say so, 凯刻斯 can work with only 1 tentacle
u do not need to gain new tentacle
but u still need to grow ur tentacle attack number
and u could click on the big tentacle icon, then chose Static Mode
The card version or the in battle version?
凯刻斯 has a special type of counter attack, call tentacle counter attack 😆
in the battle, after click that big tentacle icon, it will show u 3 chose 1 interface
normal mode, static mode, aggrassive mode
So what static and aggressive do?
at the beginning of each turn, it turn back to normal mode

静海：
1. immediately gain 2% MaxHP sheild.
2.when tentacle attack 1 time, gain 0.5% MaxHP sheild, up to 15 times per turn.
3.tentacle attack number become 50% in this turn.

怒涛：(u should have at least 1 extra permanent tentacle)
1. tentacle attack number become 125% in this turn.
2. lost 1 permanent tentacle at the end of turn.
Huh
Ok
I'm imagining, if this game gonna release more characters, we gonna have character that give power increases buff base on 50% counter count you have.
🧐  hummmm, maybe
😆  at least after 6 month
Yeah
They gonna add furry over that month😊
I hope my speculation just delusion.

Imagine after i done this art, i gonna tell everyone this character is a sneakpeak on upcoming character
